summary: The diff implements comprehensive text contrast fixes across all six sections (Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, Footer) as required by REQ-1. Changes include darkened ink color palette in Tailwind config, strengthened hero overlay, font-weight upgrades, darkened CSS variables, and improved text color assignments throughout all components. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: CustomizationPrompt dialog modal that auto-shows 800ms after load, allowing users to describe website changes with quick-pick category chips and a free-text textarea.
hallucinated_features.reason: This interactive dialog component was not requested in the build request, which only asked for text contrast fixes. It was not mentioned in any requirement or acceptance criterion.
